title: SnakeyFlea's Ruby Mod
description: Adds rubies, a new dimension, and more to Minecraft!
body:
Adds Ruby Ore Witch Can Be Mined/Smelted To get Rubies And Which you can craft Ruby Equipment with, Adds a NEW Dimension "The Mines" great for mining expeditions just make sure to craft the "Diamond Infused Flint and Steel" to light the Andesite Frame!

Then Use A Smiting Table To Create Armour And Tools Like Netherite!
